raging_strike.name: Raging Strike
raging_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A strike fueled by anger. Generates 15 Stamina and 5 Fury.

blood_thirst.name: Blood Thirst
blood_thirst.description: Setup: Draw strength from the battle. Generates 10 Fury and applies [Marked].

reckless_abandon.name: Reckless Abandon
reckless_abandon.description: Payoff: Strike without regard for own safety. Consumes 50 Fury to deal 300% physical damage but take 10% current HP as damage.

gorespatter.name: Gorespatter
gorespatter.description: Payoff/AOE: A wide, bloody swing. Consumes 30 Fury to deal AOE Physical damage and apply [Bleeding] to all.

pain_suppressor.name: Pain Suppressor
pain_suppressor.description: Defense: Turn your pain into focus. Convert 5% of missing HP into Fury and grant [Braced] for 4 ticks.

headbutt.name: Headbutt
headbutt.description: Defense/Disruption: Slam your forehead into the enemy. Interrupts and stuns for 2 ticks.

brute_charge.name: Brute Charge
brute_charge.description: Mobility: Rush forward with unstoppable force.

berserker_rage.name: Berserker Rage
berserker_rage.description: Utility/Signature: Enter a state of pure madness. fury generation is tripled and you cannot be stunned for 15 ticks. Consumes all current HP above 1.

berserker_physiology.name: Berserker Physiology
berserker_physiology.description: Passive: Blood God's Chosen. Your Physical power is increased by 1% for every 2% of HP missing.
